assertions.description: The <usermedia> Capability Element exposes the HTMLUserMediaElement interface object (gated on the UserMediaElement runtime flag). Chromium's own migration guide feature-detects support by checking for this interface.
A <usermedia> element upgrades to an HTMLUserMediaElement instance (rather than HTMLUnknownElement) when the capability element is supported.
The <usermedia> Capability Element is the successor to the legacy <permission> element (HTMLPermissionElement); getUserMedia() remains the underlying capture entry point it declaratively brokers.
